sourcesContent:
# composition-and-boundary fixture: control flow in applicable
# matrix positions, statement-position row included. Inapplicable cells:
#   - for/switch/try/loop/throw are statement-only this wave (expression
#     position rejects loudly — an IIFE lowering of
#     try/switch-as-expression is
#     IIFE wrapping, deferred, incl. as the implicit
#     return of a function body)
#   - comprehensions are VALUE-position expressions (deterministic IIFE
#     deliberately absent); statement position keeps the plain
#     statement lowering
#, member-object position with it
def sum(list)
  total = 0
  parts = (n for n in list)
  total = parts.length
  return total

s = sum([1, 2, 3])
v = (n * 2 for n in [1..3])
w = v[0]
label = ""
switch s
  when 6
    label = "six"
  else
    label = "other"

# trivia at a block boundary

caught = 0
try
  missing()
catch err
  caught = 1 if err

u = s in [5, 6]
loop
  s -= 1
  break unless s > 0

# statement-position row: postfix update forms are valid statements
s++ if u
